chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 934 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 2. For orders on CMA No.4045/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case. 24-09-2025 On 10-09-2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing. Under the circumstances, this petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, adjourned to 24.09.2025, for which intimation notice be issued to counsel for the petitioners.” Despite intimation notice to the Counsel for the Petitioners for today, no one has turned up to pursue the matter diligently, which is pending without any progress. The absence on the part of the Petitioners and their Counsel prima facie depicts either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. We observed that in the duplicate set the documents are placed improperly, which shows that the office is so negligent to place the documents in the case file. Let show cause notice be issued to the concerned Office Associate Incharge Writ Branch (DB) to explain his position within seven days in Chamber. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
